title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library that wraps the Ollama REST API for chatting, generating embeddings, and pulling models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, usable in Node or browsers via a lightweight fetch wrapper.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that lets you plug any Ollama model into LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”) with RAG, PDF upload, role-play, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous & asynchronous APIs and POJO model mappings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI to chat over your documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that exposes Ollama models to servers with slash commands and role-based access.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling options.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that sends selected text or buffers to Ollama for completion, refactoring, or explanation inside the editor.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM-powered tests.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed request/response models and both sync & async APIs.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Go service that bridges Ollama to Slack via socket-mode for interactive model chatting in channels.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async HTTP bindings to Ollama with serde-powered type safety.

title: ollama-chat-angular
summary: Angular demo app that consumes Ollama’s OpenAI-compatible endpoint to build a chat-like interface in the browser.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, or rewrite text using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset that enables Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot written in Python that offers group or private chat with any Ollama model and per-user quota control.
